ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "initial_height" REAL /* Initial height of the projectile at the start of the simulation */,
  "initial_velocity" REAL /* Initial velocity of the projectile at the start of the simulation */,
  "gravity" REAL /* Gravity constant used in the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the simulation belongs to */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data point was recorded */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the projectile at the given time */,
  "height_derivative" REAL /* Derivative of height with respect to time */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the projectile at the given time */,
  "velocity_derivative" REAL /* Derivative of velocity with respect to time */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the projectile at the given time */,
  "acceleration_derivative" REAL /* Derivative of acceleration with respect to time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_params_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user left the project (null if still a member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., maximum height, time of flight) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., design document, simulation report) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the entity */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_entity" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (e.g., simulation, project) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed entity */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is subscribed to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is subscribed to */,
  "subscribed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user subscribed to the project */,
  "unsubscribed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user unsubscribed from the project (null if still subscribed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_subscriptions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., new comment, project update) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., simulation, project) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "performed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the collaborator joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_tags_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
